calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Campbell (via court call) for Kevin Brown. Patricia Rosenberg for (respondent) Sandra O'Brien.

The Court asked the parties why they need continued monitoring. Ms. Rosenberg stated that their goal is to sell the property, that they are not happy with the marketing for it, that they will be having a review with the mediator and that her client can bring a petition if she chooses but there is no indication of such at this time. Mr. Campbell stated that the issue is getting the house sold, that the house is an older property and that it has some issues and that they hope to get it sold in the spring or summer. Ms. Rosenberg confirmed that the only remaining issue is the sale of the property which is in Redding. The Court stated that it will take the underlying petition (status on mediation) off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Mayo. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Continued To Feb-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2015 Vacated

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Continued To Oct-05-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions Re: Occupancy Agreement And To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-05-2014 Continued To May-04-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Sancimino for Sandra O'Brien (Trustee). Robert Campbell appeared by telephone for Kevin Brown (Petitioner).

Ms. Sancimino stated that situs of trust administration is in San Francisco, that her Client lives in Santa Cruz and Redding, and that her Client comes to San Francisco to meet with her and to execute Trust documents. Mr. Campbell stated that he is not seeking to change venue, that the issue was raised by the Probate Examiner and that the property is in Shasta. Counsel also stated that discovery needs to be conducted and that the evidentiary hearing on the life estate/occupancy issue will be more than two half days. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than March 30, 2015. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 2, 2015. The Parties are to return on April 6, 2015 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation. The petition for instructions was set for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge (206) on May 4, 2015 at 9:30 a.m., (order for the same signed in open court/a copy of the order and notice of trial, and the order referring the case to pro bono mediation was provided to Ms. Sancimino). The Clerk will e mail a copy of said orders to Mr. Campbell.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
